reasoning: The chart configuration fails to answer the core part of the business question: 'Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup... in den Jahren 2021 bis 2024' (What was the revenue... in the years 2021-2024). The user is asking for annual totals or a year-over-year comparison of total earnings. Instead, the provided chart displays monthly revenue figures overlaid on top of each other without aggregation by year. While it shows the raw data points, it does not provide the summarized annual revenue requested ('total earnings'). A line chart with months on the X-axis makes it impossible to quickly read the total yearly performance; the user would have to mentally sum up 12 data points per year. Additionally, plotting four separate lines against a single month axis creates significant visual clutter and confusion regarding which peak belongs to which year's context relative to the others.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a bar chart where the X-axis represents the Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and the Y-axis represents the Sum of Revenue ([Umsatz SD/CO]) aggregated for that year. This directly answers 'how much revenue' per year.
